description:
ReferenceMultiplexers allow to curate a list of references and drive a target with one of them.

Unlike ValueMultiplexers they don't implement IValue and therefore can't be accessed directly within ProtoFlux.

fields.Target: A SyncRef which is driven with the currently selected reference
fields.Index: 0-based index that determines which reference of ``References`` has been selected; values outside the range ``[0;length-1]`` are wrapped around internally.
fields.References: A list of references which can also individually be driven or written to
fields.AllowWriteBack: Setting this to ``true`` redirects writes from ``Target`` to the currently indexed list entry.

usage:
The component behaves similar to a ReferenceCopy with the list entry indicated by ``Index`` as its ``Source``.
Changes to ``Index`` or the list entries will affect ``Target`` whenever the drive is evaluated.
